zh.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth是Lord John de Monmouth的女兒，於1204年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾。她於大約1218年與Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville在英國達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年11月之後在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth是Lord John de Monmouth的女儿，于1204年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾。她于大约1218年与Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville在英国達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年11月之后在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比 卡素，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Monmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth was born in 1204, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Lord John de Monmouth. She married Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville about 1218, in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after November 1247, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England.

fr.Raby-with-Keverstone, Staindrop, Durham,: Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth est née en 1204, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Lord John de Monmouth. Elle a épousé Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville environ 1218, à Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après novembre 1247, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth wurde 1204 in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Lord John de Monmouth geboren. Sie hat um 1218 in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach November 1247 in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth è nata il nel 1204 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Lord John de Monmouth. Lei sposato Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville circa 1218, nel Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il novembre 1247, nel Raby Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Staindrop, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouthは1204年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでLord John de Monmouthの娘として生まれた。約1218年にイギリスダルハムラビー ウィス ケバーストーンでSir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年11月以後にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで死去し，イギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.Raby-with-Keverstone, Staindrop, Durham,: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth(은)는 1204년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Lord John de Monmouth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1218년 영국 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤에서 Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 11월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth nasceu em 1204, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Lord John de Monmouth. Ela casou-se com Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville aproximadamente 1218, em Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após novembro de 1247, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Raby-with-Keverstone, Staindrop, Durham,: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Joan Monmouth родилась в 1204 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Lord John de Monmouth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville около 1218 г. в местности раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после ноябрь 1247 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия.
